system.description:
Prerequisites: None

Focus Power: Routine (+20) Willpower Test

Subtype: Concentration

The psyker's form shimmers and shifts, causing attacks to miss as reality itself bends around him. This power represents the ever-changing nature of Tzeentch, making the psyker difficult to pin down or harm.

This power is used as a Reaction when the psyker is hit by an attack. The attacker must immediately reroll the attack and take the worse of the two results. The psyker may use this power a number of times per round equal to his Psy Rating.
